name: mirai-clone
description: Mirai web-first SaaS for clone profile image generation on Cloudflare Workers.

scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run product:build
scripts.preview: npm run build:client && npm run product:build && wrangler dev -c workers/product/wrangler.product.jsonc
scripts.deploy:product: npm run build:client && npm run product:build && wrangler deploy -c workers/product/wrangler.product.jsonc
scripts.product:dev: npm run build:client && npm run product:build && wrangler dev -c workers/product/wrangler.product.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply mirai-db --local -c workers/product/wrangler.product.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply mirai-db --remote -c workers/product/wrangler.product.jsonc
